The cleanest solution is to reset to the remote (which has all correct content) since it was published by `erk pr submit`:

session.tool_result: Todos have been modified successfully. Ensure that you continue to use the todo list to track your progress. Please proceed with the current tasks if applicable
session.assistant:
## Finalization Status: SUCCESS
Plan execution complete. Here's a summary of what was implemented:
**`erk slot goto SLOT`** — navigate to an existing assigned slot by number or name.
### Files Created/Modified
1. **`packages/erk-slots/src/erk_slots/goto_cmd.py`** (new) — `slot_goto` Click command that: - Accepts a slot number (`1`) or full name (`erk-slot-01`) - Loads pool state and finds the matching assignment - Errors if slot is unassigned or worktree path doesn't exist - Navigates via `navigate_to_worktree()` + shows activation instructions - Supports `--script` for `source <(erk slot goto 1 --script)` pattern
2. **`packages/erk-slots/src/erk_slots/__init__.py`** (modified) — registered `slot_goto` command in the slot group
3. **`packages/erk-slots/tests/unit/test_goto_cmd.py`** (new) — 5 tests covering: - Happy path with slot number - Happy path with full slot name - Unassigned slot fails with clear error - Non-existent slot (no pool state) fails - Activation instructions shown on success
### CI Results All 5905 unit tests passed. All lint, type, and format checks passed.
**PR:** https://github.com/dagster-io/erk/pull/9327
